body:
Suresh, starter draft for corporate bulk thali package: Your weekday thali is already at 18 orders/day.
- Base: Weekday Lunch Thali @ Rs 149
- 10 plates: listed price, one delivery slot
- 25 plates: office pack with filter-coffee add-on
- 50+ plates: pre-order by 5pm previous day
Want me to turn this into a 3-line WhatsApp pitch for office admins?
rationale: Merchant already asked for the plan; response switches directly to drafted action.

body: Padma, here is a clean kids yoga summer-camp draft: 4 weeks, 3 classes/week, age 7-12, morning batch for school holidays, with one parent demo class at the end. Want me to draft the GBP post + parent WhatsApp now?
rationale: Planning trigger receives a concrete draft instead of more qualification.

body: Hi Aditya, Karim's Salon here. A quick update for you: your appointment is tomorrow. Reply YES if you want us to help with the next step.
rationale: Customer fallback uses merchant identity, trigger reason, and one CTA.

body: Hi Riya, Beauty Lounge by Renu here. A quick update for you: your appointment is tomorrow. Reply YES if you want us to help with the next step.
rationale: Customer fallback uses merchant identity, trigger reason, and one CTA.

body: Ramesh, seasonal demand shift for Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy: ORS demand +40, sunscreen demand +38, antifungal demand +45, cold cough demand -60. Want me to draft a shelf-priority checklist and a 3-line WhatsApp for regular customers?
rationale: Seasonal pharmacy trigger turns trend facts into a concrete merchandising action.

body: Dr. Meera, quick CDE pick: IDA Delhi: Digital impressions - 2026 state of the art on 2 May, 07:00pm (2 credits), free for members. Want me to send the 2-line invite text you can forward to your team?
rationale: CDE trigger is time-bound and framed as a quick professional opportunity.

body: Namaste, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy here. Mr. Sharma's monthly medicines (metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan) run out on 28 Apr 2026. Same medicines can be packed; Free Home Delivery > Rs 499; Senior Citizen 15% OFF. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch to the saved address, or reply CHANGE if dosage/brand changed.
rationale: Refill reminder is precise, respectful, and avoids inventing price or phone data.

body: Namaste, Bright Smile Dental here. Vivaan's monthly medicines are due soon. Same medicines can be packed. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch to the saved address, or reply CHANGE if dosage/brand changed.
rationale: Refill reminder is precise, respectful, and avoids inventing price or phone data.

body: Dr. Meera, new competitor nearby: Smile Studio opened 1.3 km away on 8 Apr 2026. They show Dental Cleaning @ Rs 199; You already have Dental Cleaning @ Rs 299. Want me to draft a calm GBP post that defends your positioning without starting a price war?
rationale: Competitor trigger uses local competitive facts and avoids panic discounting.

body: Suresh, new competitor nearby: a competitor opened nearby. You already have Weekday Lunch Thali @ Rs 149. Want me to draft a calm GBP post that defends your positioning without starting a price war?
rationale: Competitor trigger uses local competitive facts and avoids panic discounting.

body: Lakshmi, quick check for Studio11 Family Salon: what service has been most asked-for this week - is it related to Haircut @ Rs 99? Reply with just the service name; I will turn it into a Google post and a 4-line customer reply.
rationale: Curious-ask trigger uses the merchant as source and offers immediate drafting value.

body: Hi Rashmi, Karthik here. It has been 57 days since your last visit - no pressure. We can restart gently with 3 FREE Trial Classes around your weight loss goal. Reply YES and we will hold one no-commitment slot.
rationale: Winback avoids guilt and uses prior customer goal plus merchant offer.

body: Lakshmi, Diwali is 188 days away (31 Oct 2026). For Salons & Beauty, the safest early move is a reviewable post around Haircut @ Rs 99. Want me to draft it now and keep it ready?
rationale: Festival trigger is handled as early planning with category fit.

body: Pooja, festival is coming up soon. For Gyms & Fitness, the safest early move is a reviewable post around 3 FREE Trial Classes. Want me to draft it now and keep it ready?
rationale: Festival trigger is handled as early planning with category fit.

body: Vikas, your Google profile is still unverified. The trigger estimates 30% upside after verification. Path: postcard or phone call. Want me to draft the exact verification steps for your staff?
rationale: GBP verification trigger uses the provided uplift and path.

body: Suresh, DC vs MI at Arun Jaitley Stadium starts 7:30pm. Restaurant covers down 12% vs saturday average; keep it delivery-first with Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free (Tue-Thu). Want me to draft the banner copy and Insta story? Live in 10 min.
rationale: IPL trigger combines match timing, category digest, and the merchant's active offer.

body: Suresh, you are close to a milestone: 145 review count now, 150 target next. Want me to draft a polite review-request WhatsApp for recent happy customers?
rationale: Milestone trigger uses current and target values with a low-risk action.

body: Dr. Bharat, calls dropped 50% over 7d - now 4. Your 30d CTR is 1.8% vs peer 3%. Want me to draft one recovery post around Dental Cleaning @ Rs 299?
rationale: Performance dip uses merchant metrics, peer benchmark, and a single recovery action.

body: Sushma, views dipped over 7d - now 2547. Your 30d CTR is 5.8% vs peer 4%. Want me to draft one recovery post around Haircut @ Rs 99?
rationale: Performance dip uses merchant metrics, peer benchmark, and a single recovery action.

body: Padma, nice spike: calls are up 15% over 7d, likely from kids yoga post. Want me to turn this into a follow-up post using First Month @ Rs 499?
rationale: Performance spike is converted into a timely amplification action.

body: Vikas, nice spike: views are up over 7d. Want me to turn this into a follow-up post using Free Home Delivery > Rs 499?

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic here. Your 6 month cleaning is due on 12 Nov 2026; last visit was 12 May 2026. Aapke liye slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm or Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ Rs 299. Reply 1 or 2 to book, or share a better time.
rationale: Customer recall uses due date, prior visit, preference slots, and merchant offer.

body: Hi Diya, Zen Yoga Studio here. Your recall is due. First Month @ Rs 499. Reply YES to book, or share a better time.
rationale: Customer recall uses due date, prior visit, preference slots, and merchant offer.

body: Dr. Meera, compliance heads-up: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15. Source: Dental Council of India circular 2026-11-04. Deadline is 15 Dec 2026. Want me to draft a 5-point SOP checklist for your clinic?
rationale: Regulation trigger uses source, deadline, and a low-effort compliance action.
